mapper.select: SELECT A.DOC_ID , A.DOC_TITLE , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.AUTHOR , A.SEC_LVL , A.CONTENT , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_TYPE , A.KEYWORDS , A.REF_URL , A.USE_YN , A.RAG_USE_CNT , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DOC A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY A.DOC_ID DESC
